system.effect: The character suffers −30 to all Perception-based tests that rely on hearing. They cannot use verbal communication or respond to auditory commands.
system.removal: Depends on the source. Temporary deafening wears off after the specified duration. Permanent deafening requires medical or bionic intervention.

description.value: The character cannot hear. They suffer −30 to all Perception-based tests that rely on hearing and cannot use or benefit from verbal communication. They automatically fail any test that relies solely on hearing. This also imposes a −10 penalty to Initiative.
